issues.problem: An unnecessary second blank page has been generated, which violates the one-pager format requirement.
issues.fix: Adjust the page height, margins, or CSS print settings to prevent the empty overflow onto page 2.

issues.problem: The hero image on the right still bleeds on three edges (top, right, and bottom), continuing to violate the style guide rule: 'Images bleed to page edge on at most one side.'
issues.fix: Add vertical margins to the top and bottom of the image so that it only bleeds off the right-hand edge.

notes: We need to fix both the multi-edge image bleeding and the extra blank second page to fit the strict one-pager format.
